series_metadata.series_description: Series consists of all documentation and correspondence, both hard copy and electronic, between open enrollment team members, the state and its employees, all communication materials, presentations, all correspondence between the state and any printing vendor, and all correspondence between the state and its third-party administrators with regards to open enrollment.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: current year 2 prior fiscal benefit year periods ; Electronic: current year 2 prior fiscal benefit year periods
